prestazioni: Upgrade to a bespoke **Mulliner Performance Pack** featuring a **6.0L W12 (CW12) twin-turbo** engine recalibration via **Bentley Motorsport’s proprietary ECU remap**, increasing boost pressure from 1.2 bar to 1.6 bar with **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 compression)** and **ARP Custom Age625+ head studs** for sustained 750+ hp and 950 Nm of torque, paired with a **ZF 8HP95X transmission reinforcement kit** (torque converter lockup clutch upgrade and reinforced planetary gears) from **Sonax Performance**

Installation of a **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger (88mm billet compressor wheel, 76mm turbine, .96 A/R housing)** per bank, with **Tial MV-R 60mm wastegates** and **custom 4-inch titanium downpipes** (ceramic-coated, 304 stainless steel flex sections) by **Akrapović**, reducing backpressure by 42% and eliminating turbo lag via **Honeywell dual-ball bearing center cartridges**

Full **Mulliner W12 cooling overhaul** including a **PWR Australia 420mm front-mount intercooler (bar-and-plate, 1200cfm airflow)** with **custom CNC-machined 6061-T6 aluminum end tanks**, **Motul 8100 X-cess 5W-40 fully synthetic oil** with **Mocal 19-row oil cooler (190°F thermostatic bypass)**, and a **Continental Engineering Services (CES) high-flow water pump** with **Gates Racing timing belt (3x reinforced aramid fibers)** for 9,000-mile service intervals
estetica: **Mulliner Carbon Fibre Aero Package** featuring a **full 3K twill weave carbon fibre front splitter (22mm overhang, 3-stage adjustable)** with **integrated Vortex Generators (VG-1200)** by **Vorsteiner**, a **dual-plane rear diffuser (120mm ground clearance, 5-stage Gurney flap)** in **pre-preg autoclave carbon fibre**, and **side skirts with active air curtains (electrically actuated, 0-60mph deployment)** from **Novitec’s Bentley division**

**Mulliner Bespoke Illumination System** with **Osram LEDriving XENARC 5500K D5S bulbs (8000lm, 6000K color temp)** in **custom CNC-machined 6061-T6 aluminum projector housings**, **RGBW underbody lighting (16.7 million colors, 2000-lumen output per meter)** by **Luxury Lighting Solutions (LLS)**, and **retractable Mulliner badge illumination (electrochromic glass, 4000K CRI90)** with **anti-counterfeit holographic micro-engraving**

**Mulliner Forged Wheel Program** featuring **22-inch x 10.5J front / 22-inch x 12J rear **Forgeline GA3R** wheels (3-piece, forged 6061-T6 aluminum, 12mm offset adjustment range)** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/35 ZR22 front, 325/30 ZR22 rear, semi-slick compound)**, **Brembo GT-R 6-piston monobloc calipers (400mm front rotors, 380mm rear, J-hook slotted)** with **Ferodo DS2500 brake pads**, and **Mulliner-exclusive **Diamond-Like Carbon (DLC) coated** brake lines by **Hawk Performance**
